pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-001 (Data Quality/Skill) excluded: edge_case: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.424. Highest framework: NIST AI RMF at 0.424.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
